homeOverview.what: Mohtaoua is a premium 360° digital agency in Morocco: marketing, technology, design, automation and AI for companies in all sectors.
homeOverview.who: Managers, marketing directors, digital managers and founders of SMEs, startups and major accounts in Morocco.
benefits: Measurable growth through marketing and technology
Multidisciplinary team: marketing, dev, design, AI

trust.experience: More than 200 projects delivered for companies in 15+ sectors in Morocco and internationally.
trust.methodology: Audit → strategy → design → development → launch → continuous optimization.

meta-ads.metaTitle: Meta Ads — Facebook & Instagram Advertising Agency Morocco | Mohtaoua
meta-ads.metaDescription: Meta Ads campaigns to generate qualified leads in Morocco: e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, education and more. Targeting, creatives, CAPI tracking and ongoing optimization.

overview.what: Paid acquisition service on Meta (Facebook & Instagram) to generate leads and sales.
overview.who: Companies that want to scale their acquisition with a controlled media budget.
benefits: Precise targeting by intent and profile
takeaways: Meta remains a #1 channel in Morocco

meta-ads.problem: You invest in Meta advertising but get poorly qualified leads, unstable CPL or campaigns that don't convert.
meta-ads.solution: We build structured Meta campaigns with tailor-made, creative audiences adapted to your sector and reliable conversion tracking.
howItWorks: Audit of your offer and conversion funnel

faqs.question: How much Meta budget do I need for my business?
faqs.answer: We generally recommend 8,000 to 25,000 MAD/month depending on competition and seasonality. We calibrate the budget after the free audit.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get the first leads?
faqs.answer: The first requests often arrive between 7 and 14 days after launch, while the algorithm learns and we optimize audiences.

faqs.question: Do you manage the creation of visuals and videos?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Performance and Premium offers include the production of creatives (statics, carousels, Reels) adapted to your sector.

faqs.question: How do you measure Meta lead quality?
faqs.answer: We track cost per lead, contact rate, CRM qualification, and signup conversion rate when your CRM is connected.

google-ads.metaTitle: Google Ads — Search & Performance Max Maroc
google-ads.metaDescription: Google Ads Search, Performance Max and YouTube to capture high-intent demand. E-commerce, services, B2B and retail in Morocco.

overview.what: Google Ads service to capture high-intent demand on Search, PMax and YouTube.
overview.who: Companies with sought-after deals wanting high ROAS.

google-ads.problem: Your competitors appear first on Google and your budget is wasted on keywords that are too broad.
google-ads.solution: Conversion-oriented Search and PMax campaigns with precise semantic targeting and dedicated landing pages.

faqs.question: Search or Performance Max for my business?
faqs.answer: Search for semantic control; PMax to expand on Display, YouTube and Discover. We often combine the two depending on the budget.

faqs.question: What Google Ads budget is realistic in Morocco?
faqs.answer: From 6,000 MAD/month to test a market; 15,000+ MAD/month to scale on several training courses.

faqs.question: How to avoid unqualified clicks?
faqs.answer: Via negative keywords, precise geotargeting, explicit ads and landing pages aligned with intent.

faqs.question: Do you track calls generated by Google?
faqs.answer: Yes, with conversion tracking of calls, forms and CRM events when the infrastructure allows it.

marketing-automation.metaDescription: Email, SMS and WhatsApp scenarios to convert your leads into customers. Nurturing, scoring and CRM integration for all sectors.

overview.what: Automation of multichannel nurturing to transform leads into customers.
overview.who: Businesses with lead volume but a low post-request conversion rate.

marketing-automation.problem: Your leads cool down due to lack of structured follow-up and your team wastes time on repetitive tasks.
marketing-automation.solution: Automation scenarios connected to your CRM to qualify, follow up and convert according to prospect behavior.

faqs.question: What automation tools do you use?
faqs.answer: HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, Brevo, Make/Zapier depending on your existing stack and your budget.

faqs.question: Is automation replacing the sales team?
faqs.answer: No, it qualifies and warms leads so that your salespeople focus on hot prospects.

faqs.question: Can we automate WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Yes, with structured reminders and appointment scheduling scenarios depending on your tool.

faqs.question: How many sequences are needed?
faqs.answer: Generally 3 to 5 sequences depending on the length of the sales cycle (short vs long training).

landing-pages.metaTitle: Landing Pages & CRO — Morocco Conversion Pages
landing-pages.metaDescription: Fast and optimized landing pages to convert advertising traffic into leads and sales. Mobile-first design, CRO and A/B testing.

overview.what: Design and optimization of conversion-oriented landing pages.
overview.who: Businesses that send paid traffic to underperforming generic pages.
takeaways: A good landing can divide the CPL by 2
One message = one offer = one page

landing-pages.problem: Your ad traffic comes to a slow or generic page that doesn't convert.
landing-pages.solution: Dedicated landing pages per offer with copywriting conversion, mobile-first design and A/B testing.

faqs.question: How many landing pages do you need?
faqs.answer: At least one per main offer; ideally one per campaign or audience segment.

faqs.question: Are you using WordPress or Next.js?
faqs.answer: We favor Next.js for speed, SEO and integration with your existing site.

faqs.question: What conversion rate should you aim for?
faqs.answer: Between 8% and 25% depending on the sector, price and qualification of the traffic.

faqs.question: Do you do A/B testing?
faqs.answer: Yes, on titles, CTAs, forms and social proofs to continually improve the conversion rate.

social-media.metaDescription: Editorial strategy, Reels and community management to strengthen your brand and fuel acquisition.

overview.what: Strategic social media management to build a strong brand and fuel acquisition.
overview.who: Businesses that want a consistent presence and content that generates engagement and leads.

social-media.problem: Your social presence is irregular, uninviting and does not support your campaigns.
social-media.solution: Editorial line, Reels and carousels production, community animation and monthly reporting.

faqs.question: What networks do you manage?
faqs.answer: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn and TikTok depending on your target audience.

faqs.question: Do you produce the Reels on site?
faqs.answer: Yes, filming on site or remotely depending on the pack chosen.

faqs.question: How many posts per week?
faqs.answer: From 3 to 7 depending on the pack: posts, stories and Reels.

faqs.question: Does social generate leads?
faqs.answer: Indirectly via awareness, social proof and retargeting; we link social and ads.

crm-data.metaDescription: CRM implementation, dashboards and attribution to manage your acquisition and sales with reliable data.

overview.what: CRM implementation with dashboards to manage acquisition and sales.
overview.who: Companies that lose leads due to lack of a centralized tool or do not know which channel is performing.
takeaways: Without CRM, it is impossible to optimize real CPL

crm-data.problem: Your leads are scattered and you don't know which channel is actually generating sales.
crm-data.solution: Adapted CRM, connection of lead sources and real-time dashboards.

faqs.question: Which CRMs do you recommend?
faqs.answer: HubSpot for the complete ecosystem; Pipedrive for business simplicity; Salesforce for large groups.

faqs.question: Can you migrate our existing data?
faqs.answer: Yes, import from Excel, Google Sheets or an old CRM.

faqs.question: Do you connect Meta and Google to CRM?
faqs.answer: Yes, via native integrations, Zapier/Make or API depending on the setup.

faqs.question: What KPIs should you follow for training?
faqs.answer: Leads, CPL, contact rate, appointments, registration rate, CAC and ROAS per training.
